title: QuantumScape Investor Relations Overview
text: QuantumScape's investor relations materials highlight the company's strategic focus on commercializing solid-state battery technology through a capital-light, licensing-based business model. The company emphasizes several key differentiators including its proprietary Cobra separator manufacturing process, which offers significant speed and efficiency improvements over prior generation equipment. Financial metrics show the company maintains strong liquidity of approximately $904.7 million as of Q1 2026, with cash runway extending into 2029 based on current burn rates. Management has guided to continued adjusted EBITDA losses in the range of $250 million to $275 million for full year 2026 as the company scales manufacturing capabilities. The investor relations team highlights the company's multiple revenue streams including licensing royalties, customer billings for development activities, and potential future product sales once commercial production begins. Upcoming catalysts for 2026 include increased customer billings, sample cell shipments to customers for validation testing, and potential announcements of additional OEM partnerships.
